name: session-memory
description: Builds persistent intelligence — both project state and knowledge — across your working world. Nine commands: /remember (commit sessions), /recall (surface context and knowledge), /search (find anything), /learn (capture a gotcha, model, or lesson), /note (quick one-liner), /review (weekly synthesis), /forget (archive projects), /timeline (chronological views), /cleanup (memory maintenance). Designed for anyone who wants Claude to accumulate understanding across conversations — not just track tasks, but actually learn.
